register.note: Full-width composed OLS-cloud hero with giant outlier squares is poster-worthy and thumbnail-legible; bottom padding added so the lowest squares no longer kiss the axis.

The squared penalty IS the picture — area = loss, outliers' enormous squares visibly bend the line — strictly more legible than seeing-theory/01 where the squares are uniform and the mechanism is quiet.

The see graphic self-labels (title, 'drag a point to refit all three', Huber/absolute line tags, 'THE SQUARED VERDICT', 'miss r') like distill-momentum/02; the loss-curve inset still relies on a legend rather than in-place curve labels.
Distill-soft cream field, restrained pink fills, clean focal hierarchy match ciechanowski-watch/02's calm; a tall empty column under the left See prose keeps it from 4.
Squares-fade-in on load plus draggable refit and judge-switch that move the line and recompute the verdict are explanatory like 3b1b/02; held at 3 as steppability is unverifiable from statics.

Semantic grammar held across all four views (blue=line, gold=data, pink=penalty, teal=active) with AA weight+underline Terms like r2d3/00; below 4 only because pink penalty and red warning label sit close in hue.

hero.note: Mechanism-bearing hero (squared-area residuals, outliers dominating); bottom padding added so squares stay clear of the axis.

assessment.note: Transfer is a write-your-own open prompt with a confirm-and-reveal model answer; the check stays composed against the live judge plot.

verdict.summary: Clears register 3 across all six dimensions with a genuine mechanism-bearing hero (4).
